description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was traveling westbound on Duboce Avenue between 
Guerrero Street and Market Street when another vehicle made contact with the Cruise AV’s left rear corner, damaging the lower left tail 
lamp assembly and left rear wheel well. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
